3.name: Garrison
3.description: Ability to garrison a unit into another unit or building.

object_attributes.name: Garrison capacity
object_attributes.description: Target object must have some capacity for the current unit to garrison to.

object_attributes.name: Garrison type
object_attributes.description: If target object is a building, it must have a garrison type that matches current unit's type.

object_attributes.name: Traits
object_attributes.description: If target object is a unit, it must have this bitfield 1st bit (1) set for garrison unit.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object in which a unit can garrison.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object in which a unit can garrison.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Range at which a unit can garrison.

task_attributes.name: Owner type
task_attributes.description: Controls which objects the task can target based on ownership.

object_attributes.name: Standing Graphic 2
object_attributes.description: Used instead of the task's **Working graphic (14)**. Graphic while moving, if not set uses moving graphic.

object_attributes.name: Walking graphic
object_attributes.description: Used if **Standing Graphic 2 (72)** or the task's **Working graphic (14)** is not set.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Unit speed multiplier while roaming.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Unit ID to avoid.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Minimum distance to the unit to avoid that will be maintained while roaming.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Time in seconds that the unit pauses, playing the idle animations, when changing direction.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: If set to 1, only roam around if the unit is owned by Gaia.

task_attributes.name: Terrain
task_attributes.description: Terrain Table that the unit will be allowed to roam on. If -1, use the unit's terrain table.

task_attributes.name: Moving graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphics used for the unit moving around, randomly alternates between them.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphics used for the unit moving around, randomly alternates between them.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphics used for the unit moving around, randomly alternates between them.

task_attributes.name: Carry check
task_attributes.description: Distance the unit is allowed to move from its starting position before picking a new direction to return closer. If 0, no limit.

12.name: Unload boat like
12.description: Ability for a unit to unload when reaching certain terrain.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Terrain
task_attributes.description: Terrain on which unit can unload.

14.name: Unload over wall
14.description: Ability for units to unload units over buildings. Only works for walls. For other buildings unit is unloaded on the same side as the task containing unit.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Building id or class over which to unload units.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Building id or class over which to unload units.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic of the unit when unloading.

task_attributes.name: Carry check
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

21.name: Make
21.description: Unknown. Related to farms, fishing traps and similar. Maybe the ability to remake them?

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: Unknown; resource being collected.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: Unknown, sometimes resource being deposited to.

101.name: Build
101.description: Ability for units to build buildings. Building seems hardcoded for villagers and fishing ships. Military units can use this task to build 1 building.

object_attributes.name: Work rate
object_attributes.description: Rate at which the unit builds.

object_attributes.name: Traits
object_attributes.description: Set this bitfield 3rd bit (4) to enable military units to build 1 building.

object_attributes.name: Trait piece
object_attributes.description: Building id to build.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: For units building 1 building must be the id of the building and match the **Trait piece (56)** field, for villagers this value is -1.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: For units building 1 building must be the id of the building and match the **Trait piece (56)** field, for villagers this value is -1.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Multiplier for **Work rate (13)**.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Build range.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic used while the unit is building.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic of the unit building a secondary building.

task_attributes.name: Deposit sound
task_attributes.description: Sound id of the unit building.

task_attributes.name: Auto search
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Building pick
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

104.name: Convert
104.description: Ability for units to convert other units. Monks use task attributes, non-monks use object and task attributes. For non-monk units this ability does not work if the unit does not have an attack or similar task already. When adding this task to regular units, existing units will have empty faith bar and will not regenerate, newly created ones will work fine. In addition I did not find a way to add targeting limitations, it seems whatever values are set you can always convert all units and buildings.

object_attributes.name: Maximum Charge
object_attributes.description: Amount of value to regenerate to regain conversion ability, usually set to 1.

object_attributes.name: Recharge rate
object_attributes.description: Amount of charge regenerated per second.

object_attributes.name: Charge event
object_attributes.description: Conversion range for non-monks.

object_attributes.name: Charge type
object_attributes.description: Set to -4 to enable conversion for non-monks.

object_attributes.name: Charge target
object_attributes.description: Conversion percent chance. For example, for 50% set to 50. Not changeable with triggers yet, use task attributes instead.

object_attributes.name: Button icon id
object_attributes.description: Icon for the conversion button.

object_attributes.name: Short tooltip id
object_attributes.description: String ID for the conversion button's short tooltip.

object_attributes.name: Extended tooltip id
object_attributes.description: String ID for the conversion button's extended tooltip.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Target object or object class to be an eligible target for conversion.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Target object or object class to be an eligible target for conversion.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Minimum conversion time in seconds.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Maximum conversion time in seconds.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Conversion range, if positive takes precedence over object attribute.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Unknown, for monks it's set to 3091, for buildings 3049, for siege 3093 and for units to 0. Probably somehow related to these abilities being unlocked by research. Maybe unused.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If set associated resource value is a modifier to conversion chance.

task_attributes.name: Unused resource
task_attributes.description: If set enable conversion and apply to the conversion range if the associated resource value is greater than 0.

task_attributes.name: Enable targeting
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

105.name: Heal
105.description: Ability of a unit to heal other units.

object_attributes.name: Work rate
object_attributes.description: Rate at which the unit heals.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Multiplier for **Work rate (13)**.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic used while the unit is healing.

106.name: Repair
106.description: Ability for unit to repair buildings or units.

object_attributes.name: Work rate
object_attributes.description: Rate at which the unit repairs.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: If -1 repairs everything that is repairable, if set repairs that specific object or objects of a class.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: If -1 repairs everything that is repairable, if set repairs that specific object or objects of a class.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Multiplier for **Work rate (13)**.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic used while the unit is repairing.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic of a unit repairing, seems to be not needed.

task_attributes.name: Deposit sound
task_attributes.description: Sound id of the unit repairing.

task_attributes.name: Auto search
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Building pick
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

107.name: Get auto-converted
107.description: Ability to be auto-converted to the player based on that player's other nearby units (e.g., sheep). Does not seem to work on normal units and buildings.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Always -1.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Always -1.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: String ID of a text to display when the unit is converted.

110.name: Hunt
110.description: Gives the ability to gather resources from map objects and place it into player resources. Since drop sites can't be changed with triggers this task can't be added.

object_attributes.name: Work rate
object_attributes.description: Rate at which the unit gathers resources.

object_attributes.name: Drop sites
object_attributes.description: Object at which gathered resources are deposited.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: The object to gather from.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: The object to gather from.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Multiplier for **Work rate (13)**.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Gather range.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Owner type
task_attributes.description: Controls which objects the task can target based on ownership.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: Resource to take from the hunted animal.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: Associated resource to deposit gathered resource into.

task_attributes.name: Unused resource
task_attributes.description: If the associated resource value is 1, the hunted corpse does not decay.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: ID of the graphic used while the unit is attacking.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: ID of the graphic used while the unit is gathering.

task_attributes.name: Carrying graphic
task_attributes.description: ID of the graphic used while the unit is carrying resources.

task_attributes.name: Auto search
task_attributes.description: If set to 1 unit searches for nearby objects to continuously gather from.

task_attributes.name: Carry check
task_attributes.description: If set to 1 check if target object has resource before gathering, if set to 0 use Target Diplomacy (6) instead.

111.name: Trade
111.description: Adds the ability of the unit to trade for gold with other buildings. Since drop sites can't be changed with triggers this task can't be added.

object_attributes.name: Work rate
object_attributes.description: Rate at which the unit trades resources.

object_attributes.name: Drop sites
object_attributes.description: Object to which trade resources are returned.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Building to trade with.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Building to trade with.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Multiplier for **Work rate (13)**.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: Productivity for secondary trade resource.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: Secondary resource to trade for other than gold when is enabled.

task_attributes.name: Carrying graphic
task_attributes.description: ID of the graphic used while the unit is carrying trade resources.

120.name: Generate wonder victory
120.description: Ability for the object to start a wonder victory timer. Adding it to another object does not seem to work.

121.name: Deselect when tasked
121.description: Unknown. Related to farms finishing traps and similar.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: Unknown; resource being collected.

125.name: Unpack and attack
125.description: Ability to unpack from one unit to another and attack. Not possible to add this task with triggers currently.

object_attributes.name: Transform unit
object_attributes.description: Unit id to transform to.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Enable targeting
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

132.name: Pickup unit
132.description: Ability to pick up targeted objects and turn into a different unit when done. Seems to only work on relics.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object id to pick up. Seems to ignore this value and only works on relics.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object id to pick up. Seems to ignore this value and only works on relics.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Unit id to change into when picking up an object.

133.name: Charge attack
133.description: Ability to increase the object's speed when closing the distance for an attack.

object_attributes.name: Maximum Charge
object_attributes.description: Value added to the attack while charging. Must be at least 1 for the charge to work.

object_attributes.name: Recharge rate
object_attributes.description: Amount of charge regenerated per second. The charge can be used again when it reaches **Maximum Charge (59)**.

object_attributes.name: Charge event
object_attributes.description: Must be 0 or 1 for the task to work.

object_attributes.name: Charge type
object_attributes.description: Must be 1 for the task to work.

object_attributes.name: Special ability
object_attributes.description: Must be 3 for the task to work.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Minimum distance from the target for the speed up to start.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Maximum distance from the target for the speed to start.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Multiplier on the unit speed while charging.

task_attributes.name: Work flag 2
task_attributes.description: Must be 2001 for the task to work.

135.name: Kidnap unit
135.description: Ability to take an enemy unit and when returning to a town center convert it to your own. Attacking another unit while having a kidnapped unit will release that unit. If a unit has another task that can be performed on a target - this task will not work. Units can be kidnapped on their dying animations but will be returned as corpses.

object_attributes.name: Garrison capacity
object_attributes.description: Unit must have some capacity to hold a kidnapped unit.

object_attributes.name: Task swap group
object_attributes.description: Will swap the kidnapper into a different unit that also has the same value in this attribute after the kidnapping.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Unit id or class id that can be kidnapped.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Unit id or class id that can be kidnapped.

task_attributes.name: Owner type
task_attributes.description: Controls which objects the task can target based on ownership.

136.name: Deposit unit
136.description: Ability to deposit picked up objects (task 132) into a building and change to a different unit when done. Seems to only work on relics.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Building id to deposit the picked up object to, does not seem to work with custom units.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Building id to deposit the picked up object to, does not seem to work with custom units.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Unit id to change into when depositing an object.

151.name: Generate resources
151.description: Ability of an object to gain resources when attacking or idling.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object which if attacked by a unit will generate resource.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object which if attacked by a unit will generate resource.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Amount of resources received.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: For units, set to 2 to generate resources passively. Buildings always generate resources passively.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: The value of this resource is used as a multiplier of the amount received. Must be set to some resource containing a positive value for the task to work.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: Resource type to receive.

152.name: Movement damage
152.description: Ability for a unit to damage surrounding enemy units while moving.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Amount of damage to deal per tick. If negative will increase the current HP instead. Will go over max HP.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: How often the unit damages surrounding units in fraction of seconds.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Range of this damage surrounding the current unit.

153.name: Movable dropsite
153.description: Ability for a unit to be a movable dropsite. For this task to work this unit needs to be added for the worker unit as a dropsite (currently not possible with triggers or XS).

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Resources containing object for which this unit exists as a dropsite.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Resources containing object for which this unit exists as a dropsite.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

task_attributes.name: Carry check
task_attributes.description: Unknown.

154.name: Loot
154.description: Ability of an object to gain resources and attributes after killing or converting an object.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object which if killed by this unit will trigger resource/attribute gain. If -1 affects all units. Has to be an object that can increase the kill/razing/conversions stats.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object which if killed by this unit will trigger resource/attribute gain. If -1 affects all units. Has to be an object that can increase the kill/razing/conversions stats.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Amount of resources received.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: If set to 0 applies to all units. If set to >0 then it applies to only units whose player matches this value.

task_attributes.name: Work flag 2
task_attributes.description: If set, maximum number of times this unit can trigger the task.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: ID of the object attribute modified by this task. Attributes known to be supported include: **Hit points (0),** **Attack (9)**.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: If set to 1, unit will gain attributes.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: If set the tech of the associated resources value id will be researched.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If positive, the associated resource value must be greater than 0 for this task to activate. The positive value multiplies the resources gained. If negative, its absolute value is treated as a technology ID, and that technology must be researched for this task to activate.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: Resource type to receive.

task_attributes.name: Unused resource
task_attributes.description: If set the tech of the associated resources value id will be researched.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic that plays when the unit gains an attribute via the task.

task_attributes.name: Carry check
task_attributes.description: If set, all Tasks 154 with the same Carry Check ID will count towards the same cap.

task_attributes.name: Gather type
task_attributes.description: If unit gains attributes this attribute stores the amount of attribute the unit gains.

155.name: Aura
155.description: Auras are stat modifiers that affect all objects surrounding the aura object (or the aura object itself).

object_attributes.name: Combat ability
object_attributes.description: Attribute bitfield 6th bit (32) needs to be set for the aura to activate. If 7th bit is set (64) the aura will affect the unit itself instead of the units in range (aura prerequisites still need to be met on other units).

object_attributes.name: Charge type
object_attributes.description: Set to -3 to enable temporary auras.

object_attributes.name: Charge event
object_attributes.description: For temporary auras stores aura duration when activated.

object_attributes.name: Recharge rate
object_attributes.description: Amount of charge regenerated per second. Together with **Maximum Charge (59)**, this controls the temporary aura's cooldown. The cooldown ends when the charge reaches **Maximum Charge (59)**. For a 60-second cooldown, set **Maximum Charge (59)** to 1 and **Recharge rate (60)** to 0.01666667 (1.0 / 60.0).

object_attributes.name: Button icon id
object_attributes.description: Icon for the temporary aura button.

object_attributes.name: Short tooltip id
object_attributes.description: String ID for the temporary aura button's short tooltip.

object_attributes.name: Extended tooltip id
object_attributes.description: String ID for the temporary aura button's extended tooltip.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object targeted by the aura.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object targeted by the aura.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Aura attribute value to add or multiply.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Minimum amount of units to be in range for the aura to activate.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: Aura range. If aura targets enemies the targeted enemy units must be in range of aura units sight range.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: ID of the object attribute modified by this task. Attributes known to be supported include: Hit points (0), Line of sight (1), Movement speed (5), Attack (9), Attack reload time (10), Maximum Range (12) (visual only), Work rate (13), Regeneration rate (109), Conversion chance modifier (113), Melee armor (116), Pierce armor (117), Regeneration HP percent (120).

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Bit field of aura settings: **multiply (1)** multiplies attribute value instead of adds it, **circular (2)** makes aura range circular instead of square, **visible (4)** shows range indicator (is affected by ui settings), **temporary (8)** makes aura effect temporary, **activated (16)** the temporary effect is only applied on the moment of aura activation, and remains if target units leave the aura, **translucent (32)** make aura indicator translucent, unsure how it works as its overwritten by ui settings.

task_attributes.name: Owner type
task_attributes.description: Controls which objects the task can target based on ownership.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic displayed over the units receiving the aura.

task_attributes.name: Gathering sound
task_attributes.description: Short Tooltip for UI indicator.

task_attributes.name: Deposit sound
task_attributes.description: Long Tooltip for UI indicator.

task_attributes.name: Gather type
task_attributes.description: UI indicator icon displayed (per icons.json).

task_attributes.name: Enabled
task_attributes.description: If set, the associated resource value needs to be set to >0 for the aura to activate.

156.name: Additional spawn
156.description: Spawns additional units when the unit is trained.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Id of an additional unit to spawn.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Number of units to spawn.

task_attributes.name: Resource in
task_attributes.description: If set, the value of the corresponding resource needs to be >0 for the Task to trigger.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If set, the associated resource value is added to the number of units to spawn.

157.name: Stinger
157.description: Stingers are stat modifiers applied on a unit being attacked or the attacking unit.

object_attributes.name: Combat ability
object_attributes.description: Attribute bitfield 8th bit (128) needs to be set for stingers to activate.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Object targeted by the stinger.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Object targeted by the stinger.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Stingers attribute value to add or multiply.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Effect duration in seconds, if negative it's permanent.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: If 0 apply to the attacker, if 1 apply to the target of the attack (including splash damage targets).

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: ID of the object attribute modified by this task. Attributes known to be supported include: **Hit points (0), Movement speed (5), Attack (9), Attack reload time (10), Regeneration rate (109), Melee armor (116), Pierce armor (117), Regeneration HP percent (120)**.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Bit field of stingers settings: **Multiply (1)** multiplies attribute value instead of adds it, **Not stack (2)** does not allow other stinger tasks that modify same attribute to stack.

task_attributes.name: Owner type
task_attributes.description: Controls which objects the task can target based on ownership.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If positive, the associated resource value must be greater than 0 for this task to activate.

158.name: HP transformation
158.description: Transform into another unit based on current HP.

task_attributes.name: Object id
task_attributes.description: Always -1.

task_attributes.name: Object class
task_attributes.description: Always -1.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: ID of the unit to transform to.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: HP to trigger the transformation. If >0 transforms when the unit's current HP is higher than the value. If <0 transforms when the unit's current HP is lower than the value made positive (currHp < (workVal * -1)).

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: Bit field of HP transformation settings: **Multiply (1)** will use the Work value 2 (1) as a multiplier of current HP instead of exact value.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If positive, the associated resource value must be greater than 0 for this task to activate. If negative, its absolute value is treated as a technology ID, and that technology must be researched for this task to activate.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: If set, will add its associated resource value to the Work value 2 (1).

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Graphic that plays when units transform.

159.name: Amphibious
159.description: Unit changes graphics based on current terrain.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Movement Speed multiplier.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Attack Speed multiplier.

task_attributes.name: Terrain
task_attributes.description: Terrain (or Terrain Type) on which the unit will use the task. If >= 0: Terrain ID. If <0: Terrain Type (can combine multiple bits).

task_attributes.name: Moving graphic
task_attributes.description: Walking Graphic.

task_attributes.name: Proceeding graphic
task_attributes.description: Attack Graphic.

task_attributes.name: Working graphic
task_attributes.description: Running Graphic.

task_attributes.name: Carrying graphic
task_attributes.description: Idle Graphic.

task_attributes.name: Gathering sound
task_attributes.description: Dying Graphic.

task_attributes.name: Deposit sound
task_attributes.description: Undead Graphic.

160.name: HP damage modifier
160.description: Unit has attribute modified based on percentage of missing HP.

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Value to add.

task_attributes.name: Work value 2
task_attributes.description: Threshold of HP percentage to apply the modifier.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: If 0, check the unit's own HP. If > 0, compare the current target's HP.

task_attributes.name: Search wait time
task_attributes.description: ID of the object attribute modified by this task. Attributes known to be supported include: **Attack (9)**.

161.name: Unit refund

task_attributes.name: Work value 1
task_attributes.description: Value to refund.

task_attributes.name: Work range
task_attributes.description: If 0, grant the resources to the player who owned the unit. If > 0, grant to the player who killed the unit.

task_attributes.name: Combat level flag
task_attributes.description: If 0, use Work Value 1 as a flat value to grant. If 1, use Work Value 1 as a fraction of the unit's associated resource cost.

task_attributes.name: Productivity resource
task_attributes.description: If set, multiply Work Value 1 by the value of this resource.

task_attributes.name: Resource out
task_attributes.description: Resource to refund.
